name: Sweet & Sour Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a crockpot, place the vegetables in the bottom.
2. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
3. Place the chicken on top of the vegetables.
4. In a small bowl, combine all other ingredients except rice.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
7. Before serving, make the hot cooked rice.
8. Serve the chicken over the rice.
9. Leftovers can be reheated in a microwave.
Oven:
1. In a greased pan, place the vegetables at the bottom.
2. Sprinkle the vegetables with tapioca.
3. Add the chicken to the pan.
4. In a small bowl, combine all other ingredients except rice.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover the pan tightly with foil.
7. Bake in an oven set to 300 degrees for 2 hours.
8. Before serving, make the hot cooked rice.
9. Serve the chicken over the rice.
